description_long: This is a necklace featuring a series of irregularly shaped, pinkish-red beads strung along a dark cord. The beads are clustered in the lower center, with a larger pendant-like arrangement hanging at the bottom, creating a focal point. The necklace is displayed on a white bust stand, which highlights the contrast between the dark cord and the vibrant beads. The beads appear to be made of a polished stone or resin, giving them a glossy, smooth finish. The cord is thin and dark, likely made of leather or synthetic material, and loops around the neck in a simple, elegant manner. The overall design is organic and slightly asymmetrical, lending a handcrafted, artistic feel.
description: A necklace with pinkish-red polished beads on a dark cord, featuring a clustered pendant arrangement. The design is organic and visually striking against a white display bust.
description_view_0: The necklace is seen from the back, showing only the dark cord encircling the neck of the display bust.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the thickness of the beads and the way they protrude from the bust, with the pendant cluster partially visible.
description_view_2: The front view displays the full necklace, highlighting the clustered pinkish-red beads and the central pendant arrangement.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the profile of the beads and the pendant, mirroring the other side.
